title: monardella villosa subsp. subserrata
intro: Monardella villosa subsp. subserrata is a subspecies of the Monardella villosa plant, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Monardella villosa subsp. subserrata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
